title: Item Counter HUD
description: A Item Counter Mod that helps you preview you specific items in you inventory
body:
**This mod tracks specific items in your inventory. It displays the quantity on a customizable HUD. You can select items and adjust settings through a simple menu. The mod supports potions and enchanted books. You can change HUD positions and colors easily. It is designed for Fabric on Minecraft 1.21.11-1.21**

note: This Mod needs any version of [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
